title: Run Arabic RTL localized UI HIG gate
summary: Ran the Arabic RTL HIG gate under the internal-reviewer signoff baseline. Doc-only intake combined source-trace inspection of Localizable.strings, an app-source RTL audit (chevron / arrow SF Symbols), and a validated multisurface-harness dry-run (7 captures). Result: fail. Allocated 3 open findings: HIG-AR-001 (chevron.right in TodayView:566 does not auto-mirror), HIG-AR-002 (arrow.right.circle in WriteView:88,181 does not auto-mirror), HIG-AR-003 (Arabic Career tab label 15 chars — longest across all 19 locales). HIG-AR-001 and HIG-AR-002 are high-confidence source-level defects based on the deterministic SwiftUI .right/.left vs .forward/.backward auto-mirroring rule.

gate_outcome.harness_plan_dry_run_status: planned (7 captures, idb + idb_companion ready; --label-overrides needed for today.ar)

not_claimed: screenshot-reviewed, device-verified, or testflight-verified for Arabic
RTL mirroring is proven correct on Owlory localized surfaces
residual_risk: HIG-AR-001 and HIG-AR-002 are source-level defects with deterministic SwiftUI rule; they should be fixed as a small targeted slice regardless of screenshot evidence.
HIG-AR-003 is a source-trace inference; needs screenshot confirmation.

RTL layout mirroring beyond directional icons (alignment, navigation affordances, control ordering, text flow) is NOT verified by this gate. Only directional SF Symbols + tab-label width were inspected.
Arabic native review is still required for any translation-quality claim.
downstream_recommendations: Queue a narrow Swift fix slice for HIG-AR-001 + HIG-AR-002: swap 'chevron.right' -> 'chevron.forward' in TodayView:566, and 'arrow.right.circle' -> 'arrow.forward.circle' in WriteView:88,181. Don't bundle with screenshot capture — keep these lanes distinct.
After the icon fix lands, schedule the Arabic screenshot-capture slice with --label-overrides for today.ar (اليوم).
If HIG-AR-003 is confirmed by screenshot, bundle Arabic into the tab-bar UI-tweak slice that also addresses HIG-DE-002/FR-001/JA-001/NL-001/RU-001/TR-001/UK-001 (8 truncation findings total now).
